description_long: This is a rectangular, heavy-duty metal toolbox with a deep red, weathered finish and visible signs of wear and abrasion, suggesting frequent use in rugged environments. The top features a single metallic folding handle, centrally positioned for easy carrying. On the front face, there is a prominent yellow warning label with a radiation hazard symbol and text, as well as a circular black lock or latch mechanism below it. The sides and back are plain, with the same worn red surface and no additional features or openings visible. The overall construction appears robust, likely designed to securely store and transport tools or hazardous materials. The box's proportions and details imply a single large internal compartment, possibly with a removable tray inside.
description: A rugged, red metal toolbox with a folding handle, radiation warning label, and a front lock mechanism. The surface is worn and weathered, indicating heavy use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow radiation hazard label, black lock mechanism, and the handle on top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the plain, worn red surface and the side profile of the top handle.
description_view_2: Rear view with an unmarked, weathered red surface and the handle visible on top.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain red surface and the handle's side profile.
attribute_handle_type: Single folding rectangular steel handle, fixed to the lid, with a simple tubular shape and no visible ergonomic padding.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Rotary or push-button lock mechanism on the front, made of black plastic or metal, with a visible keyhole.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large internal compartment implied, possibly with a removable tray, but no trays, drawers, or dividers are visible externally.
attribute_external_labeling: Yellow radiation hazard label with symbol and warning text on the front center.
